items.name: Artificial Inteligence
items.desc: Using Narrow (task-specific) AI to design systems that have a limited set of tasks focusing on improving day-to-day life.

items.name: Archival
items.desc: Preserving and Organizing Digital or Physical records to ensure accessibility and usability no matter the time.

items.name: Digital Ethics / Privacy
items.desc: Studying system for responsible data use, algorithmic fairness and user privacy.

items.name: Cybersecurity
items.desc: Studying vulnerabilities, threat models, and defensive strategies to protect digital systems and data.
